reviews.comment:
NO BAJEN A LOS BAÑOS... UNA LETRINA SERIA LIMPIA, POR FAVOR SI SE EVITA CONTAGIAR EL COVID DEFINITIVAMENTE ESTA NO ES LA FORMA.

(Translated by Google)
DO NOT GO DOWN TO THE BATHROOMS... A PROPER TOILET IS CLEAN, PLEASE. IF YOU WANT TO AVOID SPREADING COVID, THIS IS DEFINITELY NOT THE WAY.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom was very dirty on Monday at 7am, a day and time when it should have been shining everywhere.
